summary.en: CDUs containing pumps, controls, fans, or power supplies operating at 50–1000 V AC / 75–1500 V DC must satisfy LVD 2014/35/EU and bear CE marking before EU market placement. A Declaration of Conformity (DoC) and technical file are mandatory legal requirements. Harmonised standards such as EN 62368-1 (audio/video/IT equipment) or EN 60204-1 (safety of machinery — electrical equipment) may be used voluntarily to confer a presumption of conformity for relevant LVD safety objectives; alternative technical solutions are allowed if the manufacturer demonstrates compliance with the Directive.
summary.zh: 含有泵、控制器、风扇或电源（工作电压50–1000 V AC / 75–1500 V DC）的CDU在投放欧盟市场前须满足LVD 2014/35/EU并加贴CE标志。合格声明（DoC）及技术文件是强制性法律要求。EN 62368-1（音视频/IT设备）或EN 60204-1（机械电气安全）等协调标准可自愿用于对相关LVD安全目标产生符合性推定；如制造商能证明符合指令，也允许采用其他技术方案。
summary.zht: 含有泵、控制器、風扇或電源（工作電壓50–1000 V AC / 75–1500 V DC）的CDU在投放歐盟市場前須滿足LVD 2014/35/EU並加貼CE標誌。合格聲明（DoC）及技術文件是強制性法律要求。EN 62368-1（音視頻/IT設備）或EN 60204-1（機械電氣安全）等協調標準可自願用於對相關LVD安全目標產生符合性推定；如製造商能證明符合指令，也允許採用其他技術方案。

summary.en: China does not have a single LVD-equivalent directive. Electrical safety for data-centre liquid-cooling equipment is addressed through GB/T 51409-2021 (technical standard for data-centre liquid cooling) and, for telecom data centres, YD/T 2378. Compulsory CCC certification under GB 4943.1 applies to IT/AV equipment, and GB 5226.1 (equivalent to IEC 60204-1) applies to electrical equipment of machines. National-standard compliance is self-declared or third-party tested; there is no unified CE-style single-point EU declaration.
summary.zh: 中国没有单一的低电压指令等效法规。数据中心液冷设备的电气安全通过GB/T 51409-2021（数据中心液冷技术标准）及电信数据中心适用的YD/T 2378等标准加以规范。IT/AV设备须依GB 4943.1进行强制性CCC认证，机械电气设备适用GB 5226.1（等同IEC 60204-1）。国标符合性采用自我声明或第三方检测，不存在类似CE的统一单点合格声明。
summary.zht: 中國沒有單一的低電壓指令等效法規。數據中心液冷設備的電氣安全通過GB/T 51409-2021（數據中心液冷技術標準）及電信數據中心適用的YD/T 2378等標準加以規範。IT/AV設備須依GB 4943.1進行強制性CCC認證，機械電氣設備適用GB 5226.1（等同IEC 60204-1）。國標符合性採用自我聲明或第三方檢測，不存在類似CE的統一單點合格聲明。

gap.en: EU law requires LVD conformity, CE marking, an EU Declaration of Conformity and a technical file. Harmonised LVD standards are voluntary presumption-of-conformity tools, not mandatory or sole standards, and the LVD generally uses manufacturer self-assessment rather than Notified Body approval. China's CCC covers only certain product categories and does not satisfy EU LVD. Exporters must build EU-specific evidence, testing and documentation, and ensure an EU economic operator where required.
gap.zh: 欧盟法律要求满足LVD、加贴CE标志、出具欧盟合格声明并编制技术文件。协调低电压标准是自愿性符合性推定工具，不是强制或唯一标准；LVD通常采用制造商自我评估，而非公告机构批准。中国CCC仅覆盖特定产品类别，不满足欧盟LVD要求。出口商须建立欧盟专项证据、测试及文件，并在要求适用时确保有欧盟经济经营者。
gap.zht: 歐盟法律要求滿足LVD、加貼CE標誌、出具歐盟合格聲明並編製技術文件。協調低電壓標準是自願性符合性推定工具，不是強制或唯一標準；LVD通常採用製造商自我評估，而非公告機構批准。中國CCC僅覆蓋特定產品類別，不滿足歐盟LVD要求。出口商須建立歐盟專項證據、測試及文件，並在要求適用時確保有歐盟經濟經營者。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation — LVD 2014/35/EU conformity, CE marking, EU DoC and technical file before EU market placement; EN 62368-1 and EN 60204-1 are voluntary harmonised standards that may confer presumption of conformity
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory CCC for in-scope categories; GB/T standards are recommended/voluntary for liquid-cooling specifics

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A CDU with electrical components operating within LVD voltage ranges must comply with LVD 2014/35/EU and be CE marked. EN 60204-1 or EN 62368-1 may be used voluntarily to support presumption of conformity, but they are not the mandatory legal obligation or the sole route. Chinese CCC certification does not substitute for EU CE marking. Independent gap assessment and suitable EU evidence/testing are required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 工作电压在LVD范围内的CDU必须符合LVD 2014/35/EU并加贴CE标志。EN 60204-1或EN 62368-1可自愿用于支持符合性推定，但其本身不是强制性法律义务或唯一路径。中国CCC认证不能替代欧盟CE标志，须进行独立差距评估并准备适当的欧盟证据/测试。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 工作電壓在LVD範圍內的CDU必須符合LVD 2014/35/EU並加貼CE標誌。EN 60204-1或EN 62368-1可自願用於支持符合性推定，但其本身不是強制性法律義務或唯一路徑。中國CCC認證不能替代歐盟CE標誌，須進行獨立差距評估並準備適當的歐盟證據/測試。

requirement_topic.en: Machinery Safety — Pumps and Mechanical Assemblies
requirement_topic.zh: 机械安全——泵及机械组件
requirement_topic.zht: 機械安全——泵及機械組件

summary.en: Pumps integrated into a CDU may be machinery under Machinery Directive 2006/42/EC and, where the Directive applies, must satisfy the Essential Health and Safety Requirements (EHSRs), carry CE marking and have a DoC. EN ISO 12100 (risk assessment) and EN 809 (pumps for liquids) are voluntary harmonised standards that may support presumption of conformity; alternative risk-assessment and design evidence can be used if it demonstrates compliance with the Directive. From 20 January 2027, Machinery Regulation (EU) 2023/1230 replaces the Directive and introduces digital instructions and updated EHSRs. Incomplete machinery (e.g., a pump sub-assembly) requires a Declaration of Incorporation instead of a full CE mark.
summary.zh: 集成于CDU中的泵可能属于机械指令2006/42/EC项下的机械；在该指令适用时，须满足基本健康与安全要求（EHSR）、加贴CE标志并出具DoC。EN ISO 12100（风险评估）和EN 809（液体泵）是自愿性协调标准，可支持符合性推定；如能证明符合指令，也可采用其他风险评估和设计证据。2027年1月20日起，机械法规（EU）2023/1230将取代该指令，引入数字化说明书及更新的EHSR。不完整机械（如泵子组件）须出具并入声明而非完整CE标志。
summary.zht: 集成於CDU中的泵可能屬於機械指令2006/42/EC項下的機械；在該指令適用時，須滿足基本健康與安全要求（EHSR）、加貼CE標誌並出具DoC。EN ISO 12100（風險評估）和EN 809（液體泵）是自願性協調標準，可支持符合性推定；如能證明符合指令，也可採用其他風險評估和設計證據。2027年1月20日起，機械法規（EU）2023/1230將取代該指令，引入數字化說明書及更新的EHSR。不完整機械（如泵子組件）須出具並入聲明而非完整CE標誌。

summary.en: China regulates pump machinery safety primarily through GB/T 3216 (centrifugal pump testing), GB/T 51409-2021 (data-centre liquid cooling), and general machinery safety standards under GB/T 15706 (equivalent to ISO 12100). There is no single mandatory CE-equivalent machinery directive; compliance is demonstrated through product standards and, where applicable, special equipment supervision under TSG regulations administered by SAMR.
summary.zh: 中国泵类机械安全主要通过GB/T 3216（离心泵试验）、GB/T 51409-2021（数据中心液冷）及GB/T 15706（等同ISO 12100）等通用机械安全标准加以规范。不存在与CE机械指令等效的单一强制性法规；符合性通过产品标准证明，特定设备须依市监总局TSG特种设备监督规程进行监管。
summary.zht: 中國泵類機械安全主要通過GB/T 3216（離心泵試驗）、GB/T 51409-2021（數據中心液冷）及GB/T 15706（等同ISO 12100）等通用機械安全標準加以規範。不存在與CE機械指令等效的單一強制性法規；符合性通過產品標準證明，特定設備須依市監總局TSG特種設備監督規程進行監管。

gap.en: China has no machinery-directive equivalent requiring a DoC and risk-assessment dossier in the EU format. Chinese pump standards cover performance and basic safety but do not produce an EU-format technical file or CE mark. Exporters must demonstrate compliance with EU machinery EHSRs where the machinery rules apply; EN ISO 12100 can be used voluntarily for risk assessment and presumption support, but it is not the mandatory legal obligation. From January 2027, products placed on the EU market must be assessed against Machinery Regulation 2023/1230 requirements including digital instructions.
gap.zh: 中国没有等效机械指令要求按欧盟格式出具DoC及风险评估档案。中国泵标准涵盖性能与基本安全，但不产生欧盟格式技术文件或CE标志。在机械规则适用时，出口商须证明符合欧盟机械EHSR；EN ISO 12100可自愿用于风险评估和支持符合性推定，但其本身不是强制性法律义务。2027年1月起，投放欧盟市场的产品须依据机械法规2023/1230要求（包括数字化说明书）进行评估。
gap.zht: 中國沒有等效機械指令要求按歐盟格式出具DoC及風險評估檔案。中國泵標準涵蓋性能與基本安全，但不產生歐盟格式技術文件或CE標誌。在機械規則適用時，出口商須證明符合歐盟機械EHSR；EN ISO 12100可自願用於風險評估和支持符合性推定，但其本身不是強制性法律義務。2027年1月起，投放歐盟市場的產品須依據機械法規2023/1230要求（包括數字化說明書）進行評估。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation where machinery rules apply — CE marking, DoC/technical documentation and EHSR compliance under 2006/42/EC until 19 Jan 2027, then Regulation (EU) 2023/1230; EN ISO 12100 and EN 809 are voluntary harmonised standards that may confer presumption of conformity
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary GB/T standards; TSG mandatory only for special/pressure equipment categories

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CDU pumps may fall under 2006/42/EC and, where in scope, require CE marking and technical documentation showing EHSR compliance. From 20 January 2027, Machinery Regulation 2023/1230 applies. EN ISO 12100 and EN 809 may be used voluntarily to support presumption of conformity, but Chinese GB/T standards do not produce equivalent EU compliance documentation by themselves.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] CDU泵可能属于2006/42/EC范围；在适用时，须贴附CE标志并备有证明EHSR符合性的技术文件。2027年1月20日起适用机械法规2023/1230。EN ISO 12100和EN 809可自愿用于支持符合性推定，但中国GB/T标准本身不产生等效欧盟符合性文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] CDU泵可能屬於2006/42/EC範圍；在適用時，須貼附CE標誌並備有證明EHSR符合性的技術文件。2027年1月20日起適用機械法規2023/1230。EN ISO 12100和EN 809可自願用於支持符合性推定，但中國GB/T標準本身不產生等效歐盟符合性文件。

requirement_topic.zh: 压力安全——压力设备指令（PED）
requirement_topic.zht: 壓力安全——壓力設備指令（PED）

summary.en: If the CDU coolant loop contains pressure-bearing components (pipes, vessels, heat exchangers) with a maximum allowable pressure above 0.5 bar, the Pressure Equipment Directive 2014/68/EU applies. Equipment is classified into Categories I–IV based on pressure, volume/DN, and fluid group (most water-glycol coolants are Group 2 fluids). Category I may use manufacturer self-certification; Categories II–IV require a Notified Body. PED classification must be performed per Article 13 before CE marking. Equipment below PED thresholds (SEP — sound engineering practice) requires no PED CE mark but must still meet LVD and Machinery requirements.
summary.zh: 若CDU冷却回路中的承压部件（管路、容器、换热器）最大允许压力超过0.5 bar，则适用压力设备指令2014/68/EU。设备按压力、容积/DN及流体组别（多数水-乙二醇冷却液为第2类流体）划分为I–IV类。I类可由制造商自行认证；II–IV类须引入公告机构。CE标志前须依第13条进行PED分类。低于PED阈值的设备（SEP）无需PED CE标志，但仍须满足LVD和机械指令要求。
summary.zht: 若CDU冷卻回路中的承壓部件（管路、容器、換熱器）最大允許壓力超過0.5 bar，則適用壓力設備指令2014/68/EU。設備按壓力、容積/DN及流體組別（多數水-乙二醇冷卻液為第2類流體）劃分為I–IV類。I類可由製造商自行認證；II–IV類須引入公告機構。CE標誌前須依第13條進行PED分類。低於PED閾值的設備（SEP）無需PED CE標誌，但仍須滿足LVD和機械指令要求。

summary.en: China regulates pressure equipment through the TSG framework administered by SAMR (State Administration for Market Regulation). TSG 21-2016 covers pressure vessels; TSG D0001 covers pressure piping. Pressure vessels above defined thresholds require a manufacturing licence (manufacturing permit) issued by SAMR and periodic inspection by a licensed inspection body. GB 150 (pressure vessels) and GB/T 20801 (pressure piping) are the principal design standards. Liquid-cooling CDU loops using glycol coolants at typical data-centre pressures (2–6 bar) may trigger TSG registration requirements.
summary.zh: 中国通过市场监管总局（SAMR）主管的TSG体系对压力设备进行监管。TSG 21-2016涵盖压力容器，TSG D0001涵盖压力管道。超过规定阈值的压力容器须取得SAMR颁发的制造许可证，并接受持证检验机构的定期检验。主要设计标准为GB 150（压力容器）和GB/T 20801（压力管道）。使用乙二醇冷却液、工作压力处于典型数据中心范围（2–6 bar）的液冷CDU回路可能触发TSG注册要求。
summary.zht: 中國通過市場監管總局（SAMR）主管的TSG體系對壓力設備進行監管。TSG 21-2016涵蓋壓力容器，TSG D0001涵蓋壓力管道。超過規定閾值的壓力容器須取得SAMR頒發的製造許可證，並接受持證檢驗機構的定期檢驗。主要設計標準為GB 150（壓力容器）和GB/T 20801（壓力管道）。使用乙二醇冷卻液、工作壓力處於典型數據中心範圍（2–6 bar）的液冷CDU回路可能觸發TSG注冊要求。

gap.en: Both regimes mandate pressure safety but use different classification matrices, design codes, and conformity routes. A CDU pressure vessel certified under GB 150 and TSG 21 does NOT automatically satisfy PED 2014/68/EU; the design must be re-evaluated against PED essential safety requirements, and harmonised standards such as EN 13445 may be used voluntarily to support presumption of conformity. A EU Notified Body must be engaged for PED categories requiring third-party conformity assessment. Conversely, EU PED CE marking is not recognised in China — TSG manufacturing permits and periodic inspections remain required for Chinese market or manufacture. Exporters must run dual certification tracks.
gap.zh: 两套体系均要求压力安全，但分类矩阵、设计规范及符合性路径各异。依GB 150和TSG 21认证的CDU承压容器不自动满足PED 2014/68/EU要求；设计须依据PED基本安全要求重新评估，EN 13445等协调标准可自愿用于支持符合性推定。对于PED中要求第三方合格评定的类别，须引入欧盟公告机构。反之，欧盟PED CE标志在中国不被认可——面向中国市场或在中国制造仍须取得TSG制造许可及定期检验。出口商须并行推进双认证。
gap.zht: 兩套體系均要求壓力安全，但分類矩陣、設計規範及符合性路徑各異。依GB 150和TSG 21認證的CDU承壓容器不自動滿足PED 2014/68/EU要求；設計須依據PED基本安全要求重新評估，EN 13445等協調標準可自願用於支持符合性推定。對於PED中要求第三方合格評定的類別，須引入歐盟公告機構。反之，歐盟PED CE標誌在中國不被認可——面向中國市場或在中國製造仍須取得TSG製造許可及定期檢驗。出口商須並行推進雙認證。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation where PED scope/category thresholds are met; SEP below threshold; EN 13445, EN 13480 and similar standards are voluntary routes to presumption of conformity, not mandatory sole standards
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory TSG manufacturing permit and periodic inspection above defined pressure/volume thresholds

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CDU coolant loops above 0.5 bar must be assessed for PED scope and category under 2014/68/EU before CE marking where PED applies. Chinese TSG/GB certification does not satisfy EU PED requirements. EN 13445/EN 13480 may support presumption of conformity, but the mandatory obligation is PED compliance and any required Notified Body route. Classification outcome depends on actual pressure, volume, DN, and fluid group, which must be assessed per product.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 工作压力超过0.5 bar的CDU冷却回路在PED适用时，须依据2014/68/EU评估PED范围及类别后方可贴附CE标志。中国TSG/GB认证不满足欧盟PED要求。EN 13445/EN 13480可支持符合性推定，但强制义务是符合PED及其要求的公告机构路径。分类结果取决于实际压力、容积、DN及流体组别，须逐产品评估。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 工作壓力超過0.5 bar的CDU冷卻回路在PED適用時，須依據2014/68/EU評估PED範圍及類別後方可貼附CE標誌。中國TSG/GB認證不滿足歐盟PED要求。EN 13445/EN 13480可支持符合性推定，但強制義務是符合PED及其要求的公告機構路徑。分類結果取決於實際壓力、容積、DN及流體組別，須逐產品評估。
